Class Track

java.lang.Object
track.Track
public class Track extends Object
Track.java Code Description: This class represents a Track in Java. It is a double array of Tile objects that represent the track. Has functions to help game logic and the drawing of the track.

    References CheckPointGroups method of changing all of the connected checkPoint tiles when a checkPoint is hit
    void

    References CheckPointGroups method of resetting all of the checkpoints colors to the non-hit color when the car crosses the finish.

    resetSpecificCheckpoint(int groupNum)
    References CheckPointGroups method of resetting a specific checkpointGroup colors to the non-hit color when the car crosses a checkpoint.

  • Constructor Details

    • Track

      public Track(String filename, int numCheckpoints)
      Constructor for Track class
      Parameters:
      filename - takes file path to the file

  • Method Details

    • drawTrackHelper

      public Color drawTrackHelper(int row, int col)
      This function helps draw the track
      Parameters:
      row - the x position of the tile
      col - the y position of the tile
      Returns:
      Color of the tile

    • getCurrentTile

      public Tile getCurrentTile(int xPos, int yPos)
      This function may not be used but might later, returns a specific tile
      Parameters:
      xPos - x position of the tile
      yPos - y position of the tile
      Returns:
      a Tile in the track

    • getSpecificTile

      public Tile getSpecificTile(int row, int col)
      This fucntion is used in TrackDrawerGUI to write the tile's char to the file
      Parameters:
      row - the row of the tile
      col - the column of the tile
      Returns:
      the Tile at the specific row + col

    • getRows

      public int getRows()
      Getter for track rows
      Returns:
      rows the number of rows in the track

    • getCols

      public int getCols()
      Getter for track columns
      Returns:
      cols the number of columns in the track

    • getNumCheckpoints

      public int getNumCheckpoints()
      Getter for the number of track checkpoints
      Returns:
      numCheckpoints the number of checkpoints on the track

    • changeTile

      public void changeTile(int row, int col, char c)
      This function is only used by TrackDrawerGUI to edit track tiles to allow us to customize tracks and make them more enjoyable for the user.
      Parameters:
      row - the row of the Tile in the track data structure
      col - the column of the Tile in the track data structure
      c - the character we are changing the Tile to, Make a new tile and inserting it where we want

    • hitCheckpointGroup

      public void hitCheckpointGroup(int xPos, int yPos)
      References CheckPointGroups method of changing all of the connected checkPoint tiles when a checkPoint is hit
      Parameters:
      xPos - column of hit checkpoint
      yPos - row of hit checkpoint

    • resetCheckpoints

      public void resetCheckpoints()
      References CheckPointGroups method of resetting all of the checkpoints colors to the non-hit color when the car crosses the finish.

    • resetSpecificCheckpoint

      public void resetSpecificCheckpoint(int groupNum)
      References CheckPointGroups method of resetting a specific checkpointGroup colors to the non-hit color when the car crosses a checkpoint.
      Parameters:
      groupNum - the groupNum of the checkpoint hit

    • getCheckpointGroupNum

      public int getCheckpointGroupNum(int xPos, int yPos)
      References CheckPointGroups method of returning a checkpoints group number
      Parameters:
      xPos - the xPos of the tile
      yPos - the yPos of the tile
      Returns:
      the checkpointGroup number of the specific track tile in the track
